title: 漫画分镜叙事设计
description: A high-contrast, black-and-white illustration of an elderly man in a sharp suit, drawing a katana. The man has slicked-back white hair, deep wrinkles, and an intense, focused expression, looking down at the blade. He wea
prompt_raw: A high-contrast, black-and-white illustration of an elderly man in a sharp suit, drawing a katana. The man has slicked-back white hair, deep wrinkles, and an intense, focused expression, looking down at the blade. He wears a dark suit, white shirt, and dark tie. His hands are prominently featured in the foreground, showing pronounced veins and wrinkles as they grip the ornate handle and scabbard of the katana. The background is completely black, emphasizing the dramatic lighting and intricate cross-hatching details on the man's face, hands, and clothing. The style resembles a detailed, gritty manga or graphic novel.
prompt_preview: A high-contrast, black-and-white illustration of an elderly man in a sharp suit, drawing a katana. The man has slicked-back white hair, deep wrinkles, and an intense, focused expression, looking down at the blade. He wea
prompt_display_cn:
案例「A high-contrast, black-an...」属于叙事插画。这是一张叙事插画/场景图类案例，重点在故事瞬间、角色关系、动作、环境和氛围。适合改成漫画单页、小说插图、游戏概念图、电影分镜或故事场景。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A high-contrast, black-and-white 插画 of an elderly man in a sharp suit, drawing a katana. The man has slicked-back white hair, deep wrinkles, and an intense, focused expression, looking down at the blade. He wears a dark suit, white shirt, and dark tie. His hands are prominently featured in the foreground, showing pronounced veins and wrinkles as they grip the ornate handle and scabbard of the katana. The 背景 is completely black, emphasizing the dramatic 光线ing and intricate cross-hatching details on the man's face, hands, and clothing. The 风格 resembles a detailed, gritty manga or graphic novel.
prompt_template_cn:
绘制一张【故事主题】的叙事插画。

故事瞬间：
画面表现【关键剧情/瞬间】，主体角色为【角色1】和【角色2/对立方/环境角色】。

角色动作：
角色正在【动作】，表情为【表情情绪】，彼此关系表现为【关系/冲突/情绪】。

场景环境：
故事发生在【地点/时代/世界观】，背景包含【环境元素】，营造【氛围】。

画面风格：
采用【艺术风格】，光影为【光影】，色彩为【色彩】，构图为【构图方式】。

输出要求：
画面有故事感，像小说插画、漫画封面或游戏概念图，比例为【画面比例】。
variables_json: [{"key":"field_1","label":"故事主题","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入故事主题","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_2","label":"关键剧情/瞬间","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入关键剧情/瞬间","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"1","label":"角色1","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入角色1","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"2","label":"角色2/对立方/环境角色","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入角色2/对立方/环境角色","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_5","label":"动作","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入动作","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_6","label":"表情情绪","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入表情情绪","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_7","label":"关系/冲突/情绪","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入关系/冲突/情绪","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_8","label":"地点/时代/世界观","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入地点/时代/世界观","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_9","label":"环境元素","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入环境元素","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"field_10","label":"氛围","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入氛围","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_11","label":"艺术风格","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入艺术风格","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_12","label":"光影","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入光影","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_13","label":"色彩","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入色彩","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_14","label":"构图方式","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入构图方式","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_15","label":"画面比例","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入画面比例","required":true,"type":"text"}]
